sign_in_message: Sign in with your Ethereum wallet
sign_in_prompt: Connect your wallet and sign a message to authenticate
login_subtitle: Connect an EVM wallet with Reown AppKit, request a server nonce, and sign a SIWE message before any protected account data is shown.
login_authenticated_hint: Your stored JWT was validated by the backend session endpoint.
login_wrong_network_message: Switch to Ethereum or Sepolia before signing in with Ethereum.
login_ready_message: Use Reown AppKit to connect a wallet, then sign the backend-provided SIWE challenge.
login_error_no_wallet: Connect a supported EVM wallet before signing in.
protected_auth_gate_message: Redirecting to wallet sign-in before showing protected account data.
session_expired_message: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
session_expired_detail: The backend rejected the stored session. Reconnect your wallet and sign a fresh SIWE challenge to continue.
deposit_subtitle: Send funds to the Mr.Market vault on-chain
withdraw_subtitle: Withdraw funds from your Mr.Market account
market_making_list_subtitle: Create, manage, and monitor wallet-scoped market-making orders. Status comes first, then PnL and fees, then locked funds attributed to each order.
market_making_list_connect_message: Browse the market-making model here, then connect and sign in only when you are ready to create or manage wallet-scoped orders.
market_making_list_public_title: Understand market making before signing in
market_making_list_public_message: Mr.Market creates direct pure-market-making orders that keep funds attributed to each order. Public overview content stays visible without SIWE; private orders, balances, funding, and lifecycle actions stay protected.
market_making_list_public_step_status_de: Authenticated lists prioritize whether each order is running, paused, stopped, or needs attention.
market_making_list_public_step_funding_d: Locked and available balances are shown per order and asset after your wallet session is verified.
market_making_list_public_step_control_d: Creating orders, changing lifecycle state, and funding actions require a fresh SIWE-authenticated wallet session.
market_making_list_sign_in_title: Sign in to create or load orders
market_making_list_sign_in_message: Your connected wallet still needs SIWE before private order data or mutation actions are available.
market_making_list_unsupported_message: Switch to a supported account to load market-making orders for this wallet.
market_making_list_authenticating_messag: Verifying the active wallet session before loading account-scoped orders.
market_making_list_search_placeholder: Filter by pair, exchange, or id
market_making_list_load_error_fallback: Orders could not be loaded right now.
market_making_list_empty_message: Create your first market-making order to choose an exchange, select a pair, and fund an order-attributed balance.
market_making_list_no_filter_results: No orders match the current filter.
market_making_create_subtitle: Pick an exchange pair, allocate one supported funding asset, review the balance checks, then approve the order intent with your wallet.
market_making_create_step_pair_detail: Choose the exchange and trading pair.
market_making_create_step_funds_detail: Choose asset and amount with balance checks.
market_making_create_auth_gate_message: Order creation requires a connected wallet and SIWE before funds or submission can continue.
market_making_create_options_loading: Loading pure market-making pairs from the web3 market-making API…
market_making_create_options_error_title: Create options could not be loaded.
market_making_create_specs_from_api: Specs available from the web3 market-making API
market_making_create_strategy_note: Normal users create direct pure_market_making orders only; advanced strategy settings are hidden.
market_making_create_deposit_asset_hint: Supported base and quote assets come from the selected exchange pair.
market_making_create_low_balance_message: This order needs more {asset} before creation can proceed. Deposit funds, then return to submit the order.
market_making_create_review_balance_chec: Balance and allocation checked before submission.
market_making_create_review_wallet_note: Wallet approval is required before create API submission.
market_making_create_review_ready: Review is ready. Authorizing will request a Reown AppKit wallet signature before posting to /web3/market-making/orders.
market_making_create_wallet_pending: Waiting for wallet approval for this pure market-making order…
market_making_create_submit_error_hint: Pair, asset, and amount were preserved for retry.
market_making_create_error_generic: The order request could not be completed right now.
market_making_create_error_options_requi: Pair options must load before submission.
market_making_create_error_no_pairs: No supported pair options are available for order creation.
market_making_create_error_asset_require: Choose a supported initial deposit asset.
market_making_create_error_asset_unsuppo: {asset} is not supported for the selected pair.
market_making_create_error_amount_numeri: Enter a numeric initial deposit amount.
market_making_create_error_amount_positi: Initial deposit amount must be greater than zero.
market_making_create_error_amount_minimu: Initial deposit must be at least {amount} {asset}.
market_making_create_error_amount_maximu: Initial deposit must not exceed {amount} {asset} for this pair.
market_making_create_error_amount_availa: Initial deposit exceeds available {asset} balance of {amount}.
market_making_create_error_approval_miss: Wallet approval signature was not returned.
